CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Continued To Aug-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Application For Judgment Establishing Title To Real Property Under The Destroyed Records Relief Law Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Lee Bardellini, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Haig Mardikian.
Plaintiff Haig Mardikian is present.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) All persons Unknown claiming any legal or equitable right, title, estate, lien, or interest in the property described in this complaint adverse to plaintiff's title, or any cloud on plaintiff title thereto; and does 1 through 100.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Benjamin Ron is Sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court granted Application for Judgment establishing title to real property under the destroyed records relief law with the modified language as stated by the court on the record. Counsel for Plaintiff to prepare Proposed Judgment.
